nextActions: col: Download approved COL archive, set COL_SNAPSHOT_PATH in data-pipeline/.env, run npm run source:import:col
gbif: Download GBIF occurrence export, set GBIF_DOWNLOAD_PATH, run npm run source:import:gbif
iucn: Obtain IUCN API token, set IUCN_API_TOKEN, run npm run source:import:iucn
pbdb: Download PBDB CSV/JSON export, set PBDB_SNAPSHOT_PATH, run npm run source:import:pbdb
neotoma: Download Neotoma export or set NEOTOMA_API_ENABLED=true, run npm run source:import:neotoma
